posts.author: BrittanyHild (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can it be possible to Archive entire Workspaces, and not jus the Boards within?

What are you trying to achieve

Archiving all the work done for an entire Project that takes up a Workspace with several boards, not just the individual boards.
